features: Support automatically “Direct Submit” e-Invoice if debtor is selected in the transaction.
Payment button sequence include debit card and custom payment.

Fix change code for MemberNo will not sync MultiPricing to the new MemberNo that you just changed.

GHL E-Wallet Setup At backend, navigate to Point Of Sales > Maintenance > E-Wallet Maintenance POS Release Note 5.2.8.22 Auto Count Sdn Bhd (751600-A) www.autocountsoft.com B2-3A-01, Level 3A, Block B2, Meritus @ Oasis Corporate Park , No.2, Jalan PJU 1A/2, Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor Darul Ehsan . An additional EWallet type is added for GHL which is GHL_EWallet and GHL_DuitNow. Click OK then sync to frontend. At frontend, to set your Merchant ID and Terminal ID, go to More Function > Configuration Settings > Device Setting 2 Merchant ID and Terminal ID will be provided by your channel sales representative. After setting it, click on OK then relog. POS Release Note 5.2.8.22 Auto Count Sdn Bhd (751600-A) www.autocountsoft.com B2-3A-01, Level 3A, Block B2, Meritus @ Oasis Corporate Park , No.2, Jalan PJU 1A/2, Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor Darul Ehsan . At frontend, download the Card Payment Integration plugin. Please request the link for the plugin from your channel sales representative or support if you do not have it. Install the plugin and then proceed to More Function > Configuration Settings > GHL Configuration. Tel: 603-3080 8888 Fax: 603-7621 0911 Page6 ID:20672 Enhance E-Invoice email processing flow. There are some flaws on previous versions of email processing flow for E-Invoice which cause inconvenience for the user. Therefore, we have made amendments and enhancements for better user experience. Direct Submit INVALID - will not send email to notify user, after resubmitting to VALID, send email to notify user. VALID - will send email to notify user. QR Submission INVALID - will send email to notify user INVALID, need to go back to cashier for direct submit. After resubmitting to VALID, send email to notify user. VALID - will send E-mail to notify user.

Their database size will grow over time which resulted in large database size. Therefore, we had implemented a feature for users to delete their unnecessary log records (mostly changelog). Tel: 603-3080 8888 Fax: 603-7621 0911 Page2 ID:19530 Pos Tax Entity Integration. User can now save customer TIN into our POS TIN server. To save customer TIN, tick on the bottom checkbox to agree to save info into POS TIN server. POS Release Note 5.2.2.5 Auto Count Sdn Bhd (751600-A) www.autocountsoft.com B2-3A-01, Level 3A, Block B2, Meritus @ Oasis Corporate Park, No.2, Jalan PJU 1A/2, Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor Darul Ehsan. Tel: 603-3080 8888 Fax: 603-7621 0911 Page3 User must validate customer email if they want to save into POS TIN server for the first time. After saved, user can load customer TIN info anytime by clicking at the search icon on top right. Below are the required criteria for searching:- Search Individual by ID – Fill in MyKAD, MyPR, MyKAS, Army, Passport and Phone then click search. [Info must be exactly match during register] Search Individual by TIN – Fill in TIN and Phone then click search. [Info must be match during register] Search Business/Government by Name – Fill in Name then click search. [Name can be partial, if multiple same value detected, a selection menu will appear for user to select] Search Business/Government by TIN – Fill in TIN then click search. [Info must be exactly match during register].
